creator: rh@heron.com.pl
text:
I wanted to install FreeBSD 3.4-RELEASE over FTP starting from kern.flp and mfsroot.flp floppies. 
The problem: when choosing the type of installation ("custom" or another) by pressing "space" key, installation program gets 11 signal and crashes. This problem doesn't exist in 3.3-RELEASE.

This problem also occures when using /stand/sysinstall in working 3.4-RELEASE.

Fix: 

I don't know any fix.
